title: Populate GitHub Actions Secrets and Variables for CI/CD Pipelines
description:
Populate all GitHub Actions secrets and variables referenced by CI/CD workflows, as documented in docs/SECRETS.md.

### Repo-level Secrets
- CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
- CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
- CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_ID
- OPENAI_API_KEY
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

### Variables
- CLOUDFLARE_PAGES_PROJECT

### Environment-specific Secrets
- STAGING_SSH_* (from Cloudways tasks)
- PRODUCTION_SSH_* (from Cloudways tasks)
acceptance_criteria: All repo-level secrets are populated in GitHub
Environment-specific staging and production SSH secrets are configured
implementation_notes: Part of Phase 2 as documented in docs/JIRA_TICKET_BACKLOG.md. Secrets include Cloudflare, OpenAI, Anthropic API keys, and environment-specific SSH credentials for Cloudways deployments.
